title: melvilla speciosa
side_effects: Melvilla speciosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, which can lead to dehydration and electrolyte imbalances. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can cause liver damage, kidney problems, and even cardiovascular issues. Additionally, improper use of Melvilla speciosa may also lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. It is crucial to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant to avoid these potentially serious side effects.
